## Opinion: Amazon Could Still Offer Value After Large Multi-Year Run

Low-signal; the 91% run reference anchors to historical return rather than a forward thesis. Not actionable in isolation.

- A SimplyWallSt piece argues Amazon may still be attractively valued despite a referenced price run of approximately 91%.
- The 91% figure is the only specific data point cited in the headline; no current price, fair value, or multiple is confirmed.
- Generic valuation opinion with no new fundamental data.
